title: Creator's Gift suppresses the Lightning response window

card.rawText: This card cannot be negated when played. Atk: +6. Hit: +6. Atk Dice Rolls: +2. Hit Dice Rolls: +2.

plan.title: Creator's Gift suppresses the Lightning response window
plan.summary: Play Creator's Gift and verify its cannot-be-negated text prevents a chain response window.

notes: This card cannot be negated when played, so no chain response prompt should open.

steps: Play Creator's Gift from player_1 hand.
Verify no Lightning response is added against Creator's Gift.
